title: solanum tabacifolium var. lanuginosum
intro: Solanum tabacifolium var. lanuginosum, also known as the woolly solanum, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the nightshade family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating wounds and preventing infections. The health benefits of Solanum tabacifolium var. lanuginosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease pain, and promote healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
